message:
refactor(vfs): relax VfsFile::read to &self for concurrent reads, clean up busy-retry loops

Change VfsFile::read from &mut self to &self across all implementations
and test mocks, enabling shared borrows during concurrent reads. All
production VFS backends (memory, unix, windows, io_uring) already use
position-independent I/O or interior mutability, making &self safe.

VfsFile::read signature (traits.rs + 10 implementors):
- Trait definition: fn read(&mut self, ...) -> fn read(&self, ...)
- Production: MemoryFile, UnixFile, WindowsFile, IoUringFile, TracingFile
- Test/harness: FaultInjectingFile, DummyFile, RecordingFile, DemoFile
- Pager tests: 3 wrapper structs delegating to inner.read()
- Connection tests: 1 mock read impl

Busy-retry loops (connection.rs):
- Two busy-retry loops refactored from loop { let Some(...) else { break }}
  to idiomatic while let Some(...) { ... } with trailing Err(Busy)
- Pure readability improvement, identical semantics

Clippy suppression (compat/batch.rs):
- Add #[allow(clippy::use_self)] on BatchExt::execute_batch to prevent
  clippy suggesting Self::execute_batch which would cause infinite
  recursion (trait method calling itself instead of core method)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
